events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The job fails QC: the rotor (23.4 mm) is already below the stamped 24.0 mm minimum and should have been replaced, and the twisted caliper hose is an installation defect that risks fatigue/binding through steering travel — the firm pedal on a static test doesn't validate either issue.
